classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是动力线表格，表头含'引线号 Pin No'和'信号定义 Defintion'，并将针脚1、2、3、4分别对应到U、V、W、PE，属于动力接口相线和保护地的引脚功能定义。

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Units only where visible OCR supports them; RPM visible for speed axis

terminology_notes: Workspace labels are graph region labels, not mechanical dimensions.
Coordinate callouts are torque-speed performance points.
translation_notes: Short term workspace translated as 短时工作区.
Continuous workspace translated as 连续工作区.

dimension_records.reason: Coordinate callout is placed on the upper torque-speed curve and identifies the short-term operating limit point.
Coordinate callout is placed on the lower torque-speed curve and identifies the continuous operating limit at 3000 rpm.
Coordinate callout is placed at the right endpoint of the continuous curve.
Visible region label names the upper operating area of the torque-speed graph.
Visible region label names the lower operating area of the torque-speed graph.
Rotated axis label identifies the vertical axis; unit text is not reliably present in OCR for this crop.
Bottom axis label indicates rotational speed unit.
Left-side numeric labels are axis ticks; unit is not OCR-confirmed in the target crop.
Bottom numeric labels are horizontal axis ticks and the axis unit is indicated separately as RPM.

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Torque unit is not reliably OCR-detected in the target crop; title text and Chinese labels visible in context are not included because no target OCR source_id is available.

unresolved_items.reason: The target crop visually suggests a torque-speed graph, but OCR source boxes only provide the word Torque and do not provide a reliable unit source_id.
Context image shows additional title and Chinese labels, but the target OCR source list does not include source_ids for them, so they cannot be emitted as text annotations.

items.text: 编码器性能参数Encoder performance parameters

labels.label_text_original: 编码器性能参数Encoder performance parameters

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整标注源图右下区域，为'编码器性能参数Encoder performance parameters'表格，列出'类型Type'为'绝对值式多圈光编'以及'分辨率Resolution'为'8388608 (M16/S23bit)'，工程含义属于编码器反馈相关信息；虽非针脚表，但在给定类别中最接近反馈连接器/编码器信号定义类，而非机械尺寸、扭矩转速曲线或动力接口。
